title: Live results: Arkansas governor’s Democratic primary underway
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: With Arkansas Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders (R) advancing to the November general election, just Democrats will host a gubernatorial primary on Tuesday. Democratic candidates include state Sen. Fredrick Love,and Supha Xayprasith-Mays, a business leaders. The GOP is expected to hang on to the governor’s office in November. Follow Decision Desk HQ’s live results here.
